name: netcup
description: netcup SCP via thin MCP tools wrapping the netcup CLI — servers, tasks, ISO, firewall, plus call/api/cli for full coverage

interface.shortDescription: netcup SCP servers and tasks from Codex
interface.longDescription: Thin MCP facade over the netcup CLI (netcup mcp). Prefer curated tools for common ops; use netcup_call / netcup_cli for the rest. Auth once with netcup auth login.
